mapper.sql: id, name, dept_id, total_words_num, our_unit_words_num, press, publish_time, print_time, isbn, sub_user_id, sub_date, data_status, sys_no, year, publish_freq, work_type, score, our_unit_ranking, biz_type, research_field, cip, disvision_code, classcode, pub_unit_name, pub_level, pub_address_type, projsource_code, discipline, discipline_two, discipline_three, is_translated, language, author_num, check_status, intro, note, sub_time, subuser_name, is_recension, school_sign, is_first_author, fauthor_name, fauthor_title, fauthor_sex, infauthor_edu_level, infauthor_edu_degree, infauthor_code, operate_time, infauthor_id, fauthor_type, file_ids, pub_yearmon, reward_fee_amt, serial_no, print_num
mapper.select:
select mon.id rowId, mon.name nameField, sdept.id as "deptLocField.id",sdept.name as "deptLocField.name", mon.total_words_num totalNum, mon.our_unit_words_num, spress.code as "pressField.id", spress.name as "pressField.name", mon.publish_time pubTime, mon.print_time , mon.isbn isbn, mon.sub_user_id, mon.sub_date, mon.data_status dataStatus, mon.sys_no,mon.publish_freq publishFreqField, sworktype.code as "unittypeField.id",sworktype.name as "unittypeField.name",mon.note as remarkField, mon.score, mon.our_unit_ranking, mon.biz_type, mon.research_field, mon.cip cip, mon.disvision_code, sclass.code as "subjectCatField.id",sclass.name as "subjectCatField.name", mon.pub_unit_name, mon.pub_level pressField, mon.pub_address_type, sprojectsource.code as "projectSource.id",sprojectsource.name as "projectSource.name", fdiscipline.code as "firstSubjectField.id",fdiscipline.name as "firstSubjectField.name", sdiscipline.code as "secSubjectField.id",sdiscipline.name as "secSubjectField.name", tdiscipline.code as "thirdSubjectField.id",tdiscipline.name as "thirdSubjectField.name", mon.is_translated as transferFlag, mon.author_num, mon.check_status, mon.intro, mon.sub_time, mon.subuser_name, mon.is_recension, mon.school_sign as hospsignature, mon.is_first_author as completeUnit, mon.fauthor_name, mon.fauthor_title, mon.fauthor_sex, mon.infauthor_edu_level, mon.infauthor_edu_degree, mon.infauthor_code, mon.operate_time, mon.infauthor_id, mon.fauthor_type, mon.file_ids, mon.pub_yearmon, mon.reward_fee_amt, mon.serial_no, mon.print_num as printNum ,syear.code as "yearField.id",syear.name as "yearField.name", slanguage.code as "languageField.id",slanguage.name as "languageField.name" from srm_monograph_info mon left join ct_srm_year syear on syear.code=mon.year left join ct_srm_dept sdept on sdept.id=mon.dept_id left join ct_srm_press_info spress on spress.code=mon.press left join ct_srm_work_type sworktype on sworktype.code=mon.work_type left join ct_srm_class sclass on sclass.code=mon.classcode left join ct_srm_product_projectsource sprojectsource on sprojectsource.code=mon.projsource_code left join ct_srm_discipline fdiscipline on fdiscipline.code=mon.discipline left join ct_srm_discipline sdiscipline on sdiscipline.code=mon.discipline_two left join ct_srm_discipline tdiscipline on tdiscipline.code=mon.discipline_three left join ct_srm_language slanguage on slanguage.code=mon.language
where mon.id=#{RowId}

select mon.id rowId, mon.name nameField,sdept.name as deptLocName, mon.total_words_num totalNum, mon.our_unit_words_num,spress.name as pressFieldName, mon.publish_time pubTime, mon.print_time , mon.isbn isbn, mon.sub_user_id, mon.sub_date as subDate, mon.data_status, mon.sys_no,mon.publish_freq publishFreqField, sworktype.code unitTypeId,sworktype.name unitTypeName, mon.score, mon.our_unit_ranking, mon.biz_type, mon.research_field, mon.cip cip, mon.disvision_code, sclass.code as "subjectCatField.id",sclass.name as "subjectCatField.name", mon.pub_unit_name, mon.pub_level pressField, mon.pub_address_type, sprojectsource.code as "projectSource.id",sprojectsource.name as "projectSource.name", fdiscipline.code as "firstSubjectField.id",fdiscipline.name as "firstSubjectField.name", sdiscipline.code as "secSubjectField.id",sdiscipline.name as "secSubjectField.name", tdiscipline.code as "thirdSubjectField.id",tdiscipline.name as "thirdSubjectField.name", mon.is_translated as transferFlag, mon.author_num, mon.check_status dataStatus, mon.intro, mon.note as remarkField, mon.sub_time, mon.subuser_name, mon.is_recension, mon.school_sign as hospsignature, mon.is_first_author as completeUnit, mon.fauthor_name, mon.fauthor_title, mon.fauthor_sex, mon.infauthor_edu_level, mon.infauthor_edu_degree, mon.infauthor_code, mon.operate_time, mon.infauthor_id, mon.fauthor_type, mon.file_ids, mon.pub_yearmon, mon.reward_fee_amt, mon.serial_no, mon.print_num as printNum ,syear.code as yearId,syear.name as yearName, slanguage.code as "languageField.id",slanguage.name as "languageField.name" from srm_monograph_info mon left join ct_srm_year syear on syear.code=mon.year left join ct_srm_dept sdept on sdept.id=mon.dept_id left join ct_srm_press_info spress on spress.code=mon.press left join ct_srm_work_type sworktype on sworktype.code=mon.work_type left join ct_srm_class sclass on sclass.code=mon.classcode left join ct_srm_product_projectsource sprojectsource on sprojectsource.code=mon.projsource_code left join ct_srm_discipline fdiscipline on fdiscipline.code=mon.discipline left join ct_srm_discipline sdiscipline on sdiscipline.code=mon.discipline_two left join ct_srm_discipline tdiscipline on tdiscipline.code=mon.discipline_three left join ct_srm_language slanguage on slanguage.code=mon.language where 1=1
and (mon.sub_user_id=#{monographDetailDto.userId} or mon.id in (SELECT monograph_id FROM srm_monograph_info_author WHERE author_id = #{monographDetailDto.userId}))
and mon.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{monographDetailDto.nameField}, '%')
and mon.sub_date >= #{monographDetailDto.startDate}
and mon.sub_date <= #{monographDetailDto.endDate}
and mon.isbn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{monographDetailDto.isbn}, '%')
and mon.id in (SELECT monograph_id FROM srm_monograph_info_author smonauthor WHERE author_id = #{monographDetailDto.editor})
order by mon.id desc
select mon.id from srm_monograph_info mon where mon.name=#{name}
mapper.update:
update srm_monograph_info
data_status = #{status},
check_status = #{checkStatus},
serial_no = #{serialNo},
sub_date = #{subDate},
sub_user_id = #{subUserId},
where id=#{rowId}
mapper.select:
select mon.id rowId, mon.name nameField, sdept.id as "deptLocField.id",sdept.name as "deptLocField.name", mon.total_words_num totalNum, mon.our_unit_words_num, spress.code as "pressField.id", spress.name as "pressField.name", mon.publish_time pubTime, mon.print_time , mon.isbn isbn, mon.sub_user_id, mon.sub_date, mon.data_status, mon.sys_no,mon.publish_freq publishFreqField, sworktype.code unitTypeId,sworktype.name unitTypeName, mon.score, mon.our_unit_ranking, mon.biz_type, mon.research_field, mon.cip cip, mon.disvision_code, sclass.code as "subjectCatField.id",sclass.name as "subjectCatField.name", mon.pub_unit_name, mon.pub_level pressField, mon.pub_address_type, sprojectsource.code as "projectSource.id",sprojectsource.name as "projectSource.name", fdiscipline.code as "firstSubjectField.id",fdiscipline.name as "firstSubjectField.name", sdiscipline.code as "secSubjectField.id",sdiscipline.name as "secSubjectField.name", tdiscipline.code as "thirdSubjectField.id",tdiscipline.name as "thirdSubjectField.name", mon.is_translated as transferFlag, mon.author_num, mon.check_status dataStatus, mon.intro, mon.note, mon.sub_time, mon.subuser_name, mon.is_recension, mon.school_sign as hospsignature, mon.is_first_author as completeUnit, mon.fauthor_name, mon.fauthor_title, mon.fauthor_sex, mon.infauthor_edu_level, mon.infauthor_edu_degree, mon.infauthor_code, mon.operate_time, mon.infauthor_id, mon.fauthor_type, mon.file_ids, mon.pub_yearmon, mon.reward_fee_amt, mon.serial_no, mon.print_num as printNum ,syear.code as yearId,syear.name as yearName, slanguage.code as "languageField.id",slanguage.name as "languageField.name" from srm_monograph_info mon left join ct_srm_year syear on syear.code=mon.year left join ct_srm_dept sdept on sdept.id=mon.dept_id left join ct_srm_press_info spress on spress.code=mon.press left join ct_srm_work_type sworktype on sworktype.code=mon.work_type left join ct_srm_class sclass on sclass.code=mon.classcode left join ct_srm_product_projectsource sprojectsource on sprojectsource.code=mon.projsource_code left join ct_srm_discipline fdiscipline on fdiscipline.code=mon.discipline left join ct_srm_discipline sdiscipline on sdiscipline.code=mon.discipline_two left join ct_srm_discipline tdiscipline on tdiscipline.code=mon.discipline_three left join ct_srm_language slanguage on slanguage.code=mon.language left join cf_srm_eaf_rec eafrec on eafrec.sys_no=mon.sys_no and eafrec.check_rec_id=mon.id where eafrec.step_no>1
and mon.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{monographDetailDto.nameField}, '%')
and mon.sub_date >= #{monographDetailDto.startDate}
and mon.sub_date <= #{monographDetailDto.startDate}
and mon.isbn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{monographDetailDto.isbn}, '%')
and mon.id in (SELECT monograph_id FROM srm_monograph_info_author smonauthor WHERE author_id = #{monographDetailDto.editor})
and ( (mon.data_status=1 and eafrec.is_current_step=1 and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{monographDetailDto.userId}, '|%')) or (eafrec.step_no = (select max(step_no) from cf_srm_eaf_rec seafrec where mon.sys_no=seafrec.sys_no and seafrec.check_rec_id=mon.id) and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{monographDetailDto.userId}, '|%') and eafrec.check_datetime is not null) or (mon.data_status=0 and eafrec.is_current_step=1 and eafrec.check_result=3 and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{monographDetailDto.userId}, '|%')) )
and mon.data_status=1 and eafrec.is_current_step=1 and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{monographDetailDto.userId}, '|%')
and mon.data_status=1 and eafrec.check_result="2" and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{monographDetailDto.userId}, '|%')
and mon.data_status=0 and eafrec.check_result="3" and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{monographDetailDto.userId}, '|%')
